mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (id, name, type, price, stock, deleted) VALUES ( #{id, typeHandler=org.shining319.newsstand_backend_system.config.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{name}, #{type}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{deleted} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, type, price, stock, version, deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=org.shining319.newsstand_backend_system.config.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND deleted = false
